series_metadata.series_description: Special claims with base period employers that are filed in Ohio and one or more surrounding states. Claims can be a combination of an Ohio employer and an employer from another state, for military separation (UCX),federal employment (UCFE), (UCDA). Files include requests for wage information (IB-4) from employers, claimants, other state agencies and military entities, and responses to those requests (IB-5). ODJFS agency employee claims.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office and 4 years in records center are completed and released, and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete, or replaced
